form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of five months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign second last of 7 at this track November 2 over 1600m, in the wet; 10 len behind It's Marlin with 58.5kg at $4.30. Previously first up; seventh of 13 at this track April 19 over 1400m, on rain affected going; 6 len behind Flash Roca with 58.5kg at $12.70. Can return in winning form.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Comes off a 29 day let-up. At the latest run sat on the pace when 2nd of 11 at this track on March 8 over 2000m, on a wet track; 0.9 len behind Sparky carrying 57.5kg at $12.20. The run before that 4th of 12 at Ascot Park on February 14 over 1600m, slow going 8 len behind Who Rox The House carrying 58.5kg at $85.80. Can do one better.
